tweet: His eagerness to violate the rights & safety of protesters for a photo op goes against the values ingrained in the Constitution. We must protect the rights of all Americans to demonstrate peacefully & do more to fulfill our nation's promise of equal liberty & justice for all.3/3

tweet: President Trump's use of tear gas & rubber bullets on Americans who are peacefully protesting is shameful & reminiscent of some of the darkest hours in American history. 2/3

name: Ann McLane Kuster
tweet: I stand w/ all Americans exercising their First Amendment right to peacefully protest for an end to racial injustice & police brutality. I mourn w/ the family & loved ones of George Floyd & communities across our nation that feel the pain of institutional racism & inequality. 1/3

name: Ann McLane Kuster
tweet: Let us join together, young and old, black, brown, and white, of every faith to create lasting change, with greater justice and equal rights under the law. 3/3

name: Ann McLane Kuster
tweet: ...& even murder at the hands of the police. Our Constitution protects our First Amendment right to peaceful protest & I support the rich tradition of dialogue & dissent of the American civil rights movement. Agitators who instigate violence & mayhem must be restrained. 2/3

name: Ann McLane Kuster
tweet: America is crying out in pain & frustration over the profound loss of over 100,000 lives from COVID-19 & the disproportionate impact on communities of color. Black Americans face an equally deadly virus in the racism and bias of their daily lives, culminating in violence... 1/3
